rules.name: Prevent provider deletion
rules.description: Prevents any agent or skill from deleting configured providers.
rules.reason: Provider deletion is restricted to human operators. Use the Control UI to manage providers.

rules.name: Warn before memory deletion
rules.description: Emits a warning event when any source tries to delete memory entries.
rules.reason: Memory deletion is irreversible — check guard-audit.ndjson to review deletions.

rules.name: Restrict command execution to user source
rules.description: Only commands initiated by the user (not agents or skills) may use exec.
rules.reason: Command execution from agents is disabled by policy. Enable exec in the agent config or change this rule.

rules.name: Block sensitive content patterns
rules.description: Denies requests where the content appears to contain API keys or secrets.
rules.reason: Request content appears to contain API credentials. Do not send secrets to AI models.

rules.name: Allow all user operations
rules.description: The human user has full access to all operations.
